ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Please Prepare
ham.body:
Hi Team,

This is a reminder that our corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on 25th April 2026 from 10:00 PM to 02:00 AM IST. During this window, all VPN connections will be temporarily unavailable.

Key points:
- The maintenance is mandatory to apply critical security patches.
- All employees must log out of the VPN before 10:00 PM.
- After the maintenance, please relaunch the VPN client.
- If you encounter any issues, contact the IT Support desk at support@example.com.

Kindly ensure your devices are updated and you have the latest VPN client installed.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Gift Card Processing Required
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to inform you that due to a recent audit and the need to reward our top performers, the Finance Department has requested that we issue a $500 gift card to you as a token of appreciation for your outstanding work.

Please complete the following steps immediately to avoid any delay:

1. Click on the link below to access the secure portal: <URL>
2. Enter your employee ID and the amount.
3. Confirm the transaction by clicking 'Submit'.

Once the transaction is processed, kindly reply to this email with the confirmation number.

Please note: This request is confidential and must be completed within the next 24 hours. Failure to comply may result in your account being temporarily disabled.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
[CEO Name]
Chief Executive Officer
